name: social-proof-aggregator-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Aggregate, score, and format social proof signals (reviews, ratings, sales counts, testimonials) into display-ready widgets and trust badges for product pages.
author: genpark

product_data.description: Product signals: total_reviews, avg_rating, units_sold, repeat_buyers_pct, verified_purchase_pct.

reviews.description: Recent reviews: [{rating, text, verified, date, helpful_votes}].

featured_reviews.description: Top reviews to feature on the product page.
